title: viscum dichotomum
intro: Viscum dichotomum, also known as the rowan or rowan tree mistletoe, is a parasitic plant that grows on rowan and other tree species. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and immunomodulatory effects. The health benefits of Viscum dichotomum include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve immune function, and enhance cardiovascular health. Viscum dichotomum is often prepared as a herbal remedy, typically in the form of extracts, capsules, or teas, although its safety and efficacy as a medicinal treatment have not been extensively scientifically studied.
